title: Mighty Polish Cheese Skillet
description: A jammy and fluffy Polish dish featuring shredded Monterey Jack cheese, perfect for a vegetarian-friendly meal. This energizing skillet is cooked to perfection in a molcajete.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork until the whites and yolks are fully incorporated.
Heat the vegetable oil in a molcajete over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the diced bell pepper and cook until it is tender.
Add the diced tomato and cook until it is heated through.
Pour the whisked eggs over the vegetables and cook until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle half of the shredded cheese over the eggs and use a spatula to gently fold the mixture.
Continue cooking until the eggs are almost set and the cheese is melted.
Sprinkle the remaining cheese over the top and cook until it is melted and bubbly.
